description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines three build jobs—build:avr, build:msp430, and build:x64—each in the build stage. The build:avr job uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/spoorcc/rocketmock/cmake-avr:latest and runs `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `cmake -DBUILD_AVR=ON ..`, and `make`. The build:msp430 job uses registry.gitlab.com/spoorcc/rocketmock/cmake-msp430:latest and runs `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `cmake -DBUILD_MSP430=ON ..`, and `make`. The build:x64 job uses registry.gitlab.com/spoorcc/rocketmock/ubuntu-gcc:latest and runs `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `cmake ..`, `make`, and `make test`. Add a pages job that also uses the ubuntu-gcc image, runs `mkdir -p build`, `cd build`, `cmake .. -DBUILD_ROCKET_MOCK_DOC=ON`, and `make doc`, publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
